example: The documentary shows the harsh reality of life in the refugee camp.
exampleZh: 这部纪录片展示了难民营生活的残酷现实。

example: She felt a surge of panic when she realized her passport was missing.
exampleZh: 当她意识到护照不见了时，她感到一阵恐慌。

example: The teacher will demonstrate the experiment before the students try it themselves.
exampleZh: 老师会在学生自己尝试之前演示这个实验。

example: The latest statistics indicate that the economy is gradually recovering.
exampleZh: 最新统计数据表明经济正在逐步复苏。

example: His silence seemed to imply that he agreed with our proposal.
exampleZh: 他的沉默似乎暗示他同意我们的提议。

example: There was an implicit trust between the two old friends.
exampleZh: 这两位老朋友之间有一种含蓄的信任。

example: The principal reason for her success is her unwavering dedication to hard work.
exampleZh: 她成功的主要原因是她对努力工作的坚定投入。

example: He refused to compromise his principles even when faced with great pressure.
exampleZh: 即使面对巨大压力，他也拒绝妥协自己的原则。

example: Self-discipline is more valuable than raw talent in the long run.
exampleZh: 从长远来看，自律比天赋更有价值。

example: Her passion for classical music began when she was only six years old.
exampleZh: 她对古典音乐的热情从她六岁时就开始了。

example: Constant negative thinking can seriously damage your mental and physical health.
exampleZh: 持续的消极思维会严重损害你的身心健康。

example: Despite all the setbacks, she remained optimistic about the future of the project.
exampleZh: 尽管遭遇了所有挫折，她仍然对项目的未来保持乐观。

example: He tends to be pessimistic about everything and always expects the worst possible outcome.
exampleZh: 他往往对一切都持悲观态度，总是预期最坏的结果。

example: Taking a passive approach to your career will not lead to meaningful advancement.
exampleZh: 对自己的职业采取被动态度不会带来有意义的进步。

example: Too much rain could spoil the entire harvest for the farmers this season.
exampleZh: 过多的雨水可能会毁掉农民这一季的整个收成。

example: The earthquake destroyed thousands of homes and left many families without shelter.
exampleZh: 地震摧毁了成千上万的家园，使许多家庭无家可归。

example: The destruction caused by the hurricane was far worse than anyone had anticipated.
exampleZh: 飓风造成的破坏比任何人预期的都要严重得多。

example: She was reluctant to leave her hometown after living there for over thirty years.
exampleZh: 在老家住了三十多年后，她不情愿离开。

example: The price is quite reasonable considering the high quality of the materials used.
exampleZh: 考虑到所用材料的高质量，这个价格相当合理。

example: We need to make a rational decision based on facts rather than emotions.
exampleZh: 我们需要基于事实而不是情绪做出理性的决定。

example: The doctor examined the swelling in the patient's knee joint very carefully.
exampleZh: 医生非常仔细地检查了病人膝关节的肿胀。

example: Our hotel room adjoins the swimming pool area for convenient access.
exampleZh: 我们的酒店房间毗邻游泳池区域，出入方便。

example: She decided to pursue her dream of becoming a doctor despite all the obstacles.
exampleZh: 尽管有重重障碍，她决定追求成为医生的梦想。

example: Plants absorb carbon dioxide from the atmosphere and release oxygen through photosynthesis.
exampleZh: 植物通过光合作用从大气中吸收二氧化碳并释放氧气。

example: The crew had to abandon the ship when it began to sink into the ocean.
exampleZh: 当船开始沉入大海时，船员不得不弃船。

example: Many countries have moved to abolish the death penalty in recent decades.
exampleZh: 近几十年来，许多国家已经废除了死刑。

example: It is illegal to abuse your position of power for personal financial gain.
exampleZh: 滥用职权谋取个人经济利益是违法的。

example: On weekends she likes to indulge in a long bath and a good novel.
exampleZh: 周末她喜欢沉溺于长时间的泡澡和一本好小说。

example: The manager began to dictate a letter to his assistant for the client.
exampleZh: 经理开始向他的助理口述一封给客户的信。

example: He was a video game addict who spent over twelve hours a day online.
exampleZh: 他是一个每天花十二个多小时上网的电子游戏沉迷者。

example: Economists predict a steady rise in housing prices over the next five years.
exampleZh: 经济学家预测未来五年房价将稳步上涨。

example: The king decided to abdicate the throne in favor of his eldest son.
exampleZh: 国王决定退位，让位给他的长子。

example: His later testimony in court seemed to contradict what he had told the police earlier.
exampleZh: 他后来在法庭上的证词似乎与他之前告诉警察的话矛盾。

example: This restaurant serves the most authentic Italian pizza I have ever tasted.
exampleZh: 这家餐厅提供我吃过的最正宗的意大利比萨。

example: The local authority is responsible for maintaining public parks and green spaces.
exampleZh: 地方当局负责维护公共公园和绿地。

example: Please bring all relevant documents to the interview with the immigration officer.
exampleZh: 请携带所有相关文件参加与移民官的面试。

example: Her smile was so warm and genuine that everyone felt instantly at ease.
exampleZh: 她的微笑如此温暖而真诚，每个人都立刻感到自在。

example: The constant noise from the construction site became a real nuisance for residents.
exampleZh: 建筑工地持续不断的噪音成了居民的真正困扰。

example: Only a small elite of athletes qualify to compete in the Olympic Games.
exampleZh: 只有少数精英运动员才有资格参加奥运会。

example: Mozart was a musical genius who composed his first symphony at the age of eight.
exampleZh: 莫扎特是一位音乐天才，八岁时就创作了他的第一部交响曲。

example: The engineer came up with an ingenious solution to reduce the machine's energy consumption.
exampleZh: 工程师想出了一个巧妙的方案来降低机器的能耗。

example: They worked hard to forge a strong partnership between the two companies.
exampleZh: 他们努力在两家公司之间建立牢固的伙伴关系。

example: The explorers set forth on a long journey across the uncharted desert.
exampleZh: 探险者们出发踏上了穿越未知沙漠的漫长旅程。

example: We woke up at dawn to catch the first flight to New York.
exampleZh: 我们在黎明时醒来赶第一班飞往纽约的航班。

example: The sky turned a beautiful shade of orange and pink at dusk.
exampleZh: 黄昏时分，天空变成了美丽的橙粉色调。

example: The new solar panels can generate enough electricity to power the entire building.
exampleZh: 新的太阳能电池板能产生足够的电力来为整栋建筑供电。

example: The neighborhood has become much safer since the community watch program started.
exampleZh: 自从社区守望计划启动以来，这个社区变得安全多了。

example: The novel has a complex plot that keeps readers guessing until the very last page.
exampleZh: 这部小说情节复杂，让读者一直猜到最后一页。

example: The government issued an official statement denying the recent rumors about the scandal.
exampleZh: 政府发布了官方声明，否认最近关于丑闻的传闻。

example: Her wedding was a joyous occasion celebrated by family and friends from around the world.
exampleZh: 她的婚礼是一个欢乐的场合，来自世界各地的家人和朋友共同庆祝。

example: Frequent exercise is one of the best ways to maintain good cardiovascular health.
exampleZh: 经常锻炼是保持良好心血管健康的最佳方式之一。

example: The same problem seemed to recur every time we updated the computer system.
exampleZh: 每次我们更新电脑系统时，同样的问题似乎都会重现。

example: The government introduced new measures to curb the rising cost of living.
exampleZh: 政府出台了新措施来抑制不断上涨的生活成本。

example: Climate change has become one of the most urgent issues of our generation.
exampleZh: 气候变化已成为我们这一代人最紧迫的问题之一。

example: The doctor took a small sample of tissue from the patient for laboratory testing.
exampleZh: 医生从病人身上取了一小片组织进行实验室检测。

example: The Northern Lights are a natural phenomenon that attracts tourists from all over the world.
exampleZh: 北极光是一种自然现象，吸引着来自世界各地的游客。

example: His vulgar jokes made everyone at the formal dinner party feel uncomfortable.
exampleZh: 他粗俗的笑话让正式晚宴上的每个人都感到不舒服。

example: We need to upgrade our computer network to handle the increased data traffic.
exampleZh: 我们需要升级我们的计算机网络以处理增加的数据流量。

example: The patient's condition began to deteriorate rapidly during the night.
exampleZh: 病人的状况在夜间开始迅速恶化。

example: Scientists believe dinosaurs became extinct about sixty-five million years ago.
exampleZh: 科学家认为恐龙大约在六千五百万年前灭绝。

example: Her maternal instinct told her something was wrong with her newborn baby.
exampleZh: 她的母性本能告诉她，她的新生儿有些不对劲。

example: Can you distinguish the difference between these two seemingly identical paintings?
exampleZh: 你能区分这两幅看似相同的画作之间的差异吗？

example: On a sudden impulse she quit her job and booked a flight to Paris.
exampleZh: 一时冲动之下，她辞掉了工作，订了飞往巴黎的机票。

example: The local community came together to raise funds for the new children's playground.
exampleZh: 当地社区齐心协力为新儿童游乐场筹集资金。

example: Technology continues to evolve at a pace that is difficult to keep up with.
exampleZh: 技术继续以难以跟上的速度发展。

example: The earth revolves around the sun once every three hundred sixty-five days.
exampleZh: 地球每三百六十五天绕太阳公转一圈。

example: The project will involve collaboration between teams from three different countries.
exampleZh: 该项目将涉及来自三个不同国家的团队之间的合作。

example: The old folk song has been passed down through generations in this village.
exampleZh: 这首古老的民歌在这个村子里代代相传。

example: Fresh fruit and vegetables are plentiful at the farmers market during the summer.
exampleZh: 夏天农贸市场上的新鲜水果和蔬菜非常丰富。

example: The region has abundant natural resources including coal, oil, and timber.
exampleZh: 该地区拥有丰富的自然资源，包括煤炭、石油和木材。

example: Many employees were made redundant when the factory closed down last year.
exampleZh: 去年工厂关闭时，许多员工被裁员。

example: The country's trade surplus reached a record high of over fifty billion dollars this year.
exampleZh: 该国今年的贸易顺差达到了创纪录的五百多亿美元。

example: The landlord is responsible for repairing the roof for the tenant under the rental agreement.
exampleZh: 根据租赁协议，房东负责为租户修理屋顶。

example: He decided to gamble his entire savings on starting his own small business.
exampleZh: 他决定用全部积蓄冒险创业。

example: Learning a new language has intrinsic value beyond just practical communication benefits.
exampleZh: 学习一门新语言除了实际沟通益处外，还有内在价值。

example: Extrinsic motivation such as salary bonuses can sometimes undermine intrinsic interest in work.
exampleZh: 外在动机如工资奖金有时会削弱对工作的内在兴趣。

example: The company is conducting an internal investigation into the recent data breach.
exampleZh: 公司正在对最近的数据泄露事件进行内部调查。

example: The external walls of the building need to be repainted before the winter arrives.
exampleZh: 建筑的外墙需要在冬天到来之前重新粉刷。

example: The interior design of the hotel lobby is elegant and welcoming to guests.
exampleZh: 酒店大堂的室内设计优雅而热情，让客人感到欢迎。

example: The exterior appearance of the old castle has been well preserved over centuries.
exampleZh: 这座古老城堡的外观在几个世纪中得到了很好的保存。

example: The soldiers refused to surrender and fought until the very last bullet.
exampleZh: 士兵们拒绝投降，战斗到最后一颗子弹。

example: Every summer our family likes to hike through the beautiful mountain trails nearby.
exampleZh: 每年夏天我们家都喜欢在附近美丽的山间小道上徒步。

example: We are planning a family vacation to the beach next month during summer break.
exampleZh: 我们计划下个月暑假期间去海滩家庭度假。

example: Teaching is not just a job for her but a true lifelong vocation.
exampleZh: 教学对她来说不只是一份工作，而是真正的终生使命。

example: The school organized an excursion to the science museum for all the fifth graders.
exampleZh: 学校为所有五年级学生组织了一次去科学博物馆的短途旅行。

example: The doctor was able to diagnose the rare disease after running several specialized tests.
exampleZh: 医生在进行了几项专门检查后，能够诊断出这种罕见疾病。

example: The free clinic provides basic medical services to those who cannot afford insurance.
exampleZh: 这家免费诊所为那些负担不起保险的人提供基本医疗服务。

example: The city experienced the most severe winter storm in over fifty years.
exampleZh: 这座城市经历了五十多年来最严重的冬季暴风雪。

example: She continued to persevere in her studies despite all the financial difficulties.
exampleZh: 尽管有种种经济困难，她仍然坚持学习。

example: The patient was admitted to the hospital with acute abdominal pain last night.
exampleZh: 病人昨晚因急性腹痛被送入医院。

example: Chronic stress can lead to serious health problems if not properly managed.
exampleZh: 如果不妥善管理，慢性压力会导致严重的健康问题。

example: The knee surgery was successful and the athlete began rehabilitation the next day.
exampleZh: 膝盖手术很成功，运动员第二天就开始了康复训练。

example: Physical therapy helped him regain full movement in his injured shoulder.
exampleZh: 物理疗法帮助他恢复了受伤肩膀的全部活动能力。

example: It takes time for emotional wounds to heal after such a traumatic experience.
exampleZh: 在经历了如此创伤性的事件后，情感创伤需要时间来愈合。

example: The patient made a remarkable recovery and was discharged from the hospital within a week.
exampleZh: 病人恢复得非常好，一周内就出院了。

example: The terminal illness left the family with only a few months to say goodbye.
exampleZh: 晚期疾病只给家人留下几个月的时间来告别。

example: It took her a while to fully grasp the complexity of the mathematical concept.
exampleZh: 她花了一段时间才完全理解这个数学概念的复杂性。

example: The suspenseful thriller gripped the audience from the opening scene to the end.
exampleZh: 这部悬疑惊悚片从开场到最后紧紧抓住了观众的心。

example: The workers had to strip the old paint from the walls before applying a new coat.
exampleZh: 工人们在涂刷新漆之前必须剥除墙上的旧漆。

example: The zebra's black and white stripes help it blend into the tall grassland.
exampleZh: 斑马的黑白条纹帮助它融入高高的草原。

example: She tried everything to remove the red wine stain from her favorite white dress.
exampleZh: 她尝试了各种方法去除她最喜欢的白裙上的红酒污渍。

example: The financial strain of supporting two households was taking a toll on him.
exampleZh: 维持两个家庭的经济压力正在对他造成伤害。

example: He had to restrain himself from shouting at the rude customer in the store.
exampleZh: 他不得不克制自己不向店里那位粗鲁的顾客大喊。

example: Tight budgets constrain the school's ability to hire additional qualified teachers.
exampleZh: 紧张的预算限制了学校聘用更多合格教师的能力。

example: Please refrain from using mobile phones during the performance in the theater.
exampleZh: 请在剧院演出期间不要使用手机。

example: She spent the whole afternoon polishing her essay before submitting it to the journal.
exampleZh: 她花了整个下午润色论文，然后提交给期刊。

example: The statue was designed to embody the spirit of freedom and resilience of the nation.
exampleZh: 这座雕像旨在体现这个国家的自由和坚韧精神。

example: The irony is that the firefighter's own house burned down while he was rescuing others.
exampleZh: 讽刺的是，消防员在营救他人时自己的房子却被烧毁了。

example: The novel is a brilliant satire of modern consumer culture and corporate greed.
exampleZh: 这部小说是对现代消费文化和企业贪婪的精彩讽刺。

example: The cheerful music instantly lifted her mood on that gloomy rainy afternoon.
exampleZh: 在那个阴沉的雨下午，欢快的音乐立刻提升了她的心情。

example: He has a quick temper and often says things he later regrets in the heat of the moment.
exampleZh: 他脾气暴躁，经常在气头上说些事后后悔的话。

example: Her outgoing personality makes her a natural fit for a career in sales and marketing.
exampleZh: 她外向的个性使她自然适合从事销售和市场营销职业。

example: We expressed our deepest sympathy to the family who lost their home in the flood.
exampleZh: 我们向在洪水中失去家园的家庭表达了最深切的同情。

example: The stray dog looked so pathetic shivering in the rain that we had to bring it inside.
exampleZh: 那只流浪狗在雨中瑟瑟发抖的样子太可怜了，我们不得不把它带进屋里。

example: The judge showed mercy and gave the first-time offender a suspended sentence.
exampleZh: 法官表现出仁慈，给了初犯一个缓刑判决。

example: The host welcomed all the guests with a warm smile and a firm handshake.
exampleZh: 主人用温暖的微笑和有力的握手欢迎所有客人。

example: Fever and a persistent cough are common symptoms of this viral respiratory infection.
exampleZh: 发烧和持续咳嗽是这种病毒性呼吸道感染的常见症状。

example: The dove is a universal symbol of peace recognized across all cultures worldwide.
exampleZh: 鸽子是世界各地所有文化中都认可的和平的普遍象征。

example: Apple has built one of the most valuable and recognizable brands in the world.
exampleZh: 苹果已经建立了世界上最有价值和最知名的品牌之一。

example: The negotiators faced a hostile reception when they arrived at the rival company's headquarters.
exampleZh: 谈判代表到达对手公司总部时遭到了敌意的接待。

example: The old mansion is said to be haunted by the ghost of its former owner.
exampleZh: 据说那座古老的大厦被前主人的幽灵所困扰。

example: The data analyst needs more time to analyze the results of the customer survey.
exampleZh: 数据分析师需要更多时间来分析客户调查的结果。

example: I cannot tolerate loud noise when I am trying to concentrate on my reading.
exampleZh: 当我试图集中精力阅读时，我无法容忍大声的噪音。

example: The old building will undergo a complete renovation starting early next spring.
exampleZh: 这座老建筑将在明年早春开始进行全面翻修。

example: The early settlers had to endure harsh winters with very limited food supplies.
exampleZh: 早期定居者不得不在食物供应非常有限的情况下忍受严酷的冬天。

example: The duration of the exam is three hours with no breaks allowed in between.
exampleZh: 考试持续时间为三小时，中间不允许休息。

example: Factories that pollute the river with toxic waste will face heavy fines.
exampleZh: 用有毒废物污染河流的工厂将面临重罚。

example: The leaking oil pipeline contaminated the soil and groundwater of the entire region.
exampleZh: 泄漏的输油管道污染了整个地区的土壤和地下水。

example: It takes years to cultivate the skills needed to become a master craftsman.
exampleZh: 培养成为工艺大师所需的技能需要多年时间。

example: The farmer decided to breed a new variety of wheat resistant to drought.
exampleZh: 农民决定培育一种抗旱的小麦新品种。

example: Good teachers foster a love of learning that lasts throughout a student's entire life.
exampleZh: 好老师培养出贯穿学生一生的学习热情。

example: Inputting thousands of data entries into the spreadsheet was a tedious and exhausting task.
exampleZh: 在电子表格中输入数千条数据是一项乏味而令人疲惫的任务。

example: We must learn to have a civil discussion even when we disagree fundamentally.
exampleZh: 即使我们有根本的分歧，我们也必须学会进行文明的讨论。

example: Every citizen has the right to vote and participate in the democratic process.
exampleZh: 每个公民都有权投票并参与民主进程。

example: The missionaries sought to civilize the indigenous tribes through education and religion.
exampleZh: 传教士试图通过教育和宗教来教化土著部落。

example: It was a great privilege to be invited to speak at the international conference.
exampleZh: 被邀请在国际会议上发言是一种极大的荣幸。

example: Many people believe that justice was not served in this controversial court case.
exampleZh: 许多人认为在这个有争议的法庭案件中正义没有得到伸张。

example: Nothing can justify the cruel treatment of innocent animals in any circumstance.
exampleZh: 在任何情况下，没有什么可以为残酷对待无辜动物的行为辩护。

example: It took her several months to adjust to the fast-paced lifestyle in the big city.
exampleZh: 她花了几个月的时间来适应大城市快节奏的生活方式。

example: The jury deliberated for three days before reaching a unanimous verdict.
exampleZh: 陪审团经过三天的审议才达成一致裁决。

example: The witness was called to testify about what she saw on the night of the accident.
exampleZh: 证人被传唤就她在事故当晚所见的情况作证。

example: The key witness provided crucial testimony that helped convict the criminal.
exampleZh: 关键证人提供了至关重要的证词，帮助定罪了罪犯。

example: You should always verify the accuracy of information before sharing it on social media.
exampleZh: 在社交媒体上分享信息之前，你应该始终核实其准确性。

example: The government is working to simplify the tax filing process for small business owners.
exampleZh: 政府正在努力简化小企业主的纳税申报流程。

example: The penalty for late payment of taxes includes both interest and additional fines.
exampleZh: 逾期缴税的处罚包括利息和额外罚款。

example: A panel of experts was assembled to review the environmental impact of the project.
exampleZh: 一个专家小组被组建起来审查该项目的环境影响。

zh: 总的；严重的；令人不快的
example: The gross revenue of the company exceeded one billion dollars for the first time this year.
exampleZh: 公司今年的总收入首次超过十亿美元。

example: The scientist made a notable contribution to the field of genetic engineering.
exampleZh: 这位科学家对基因工程领域做出了显著贡献。

example: Fighting for equal rights is a noble cause that has inspired countless people throughout history.
exampleZh: 为平等权利而斗争是一项高尚的事业，在历史上激励了无数人。

example: The temple is considered one of the holiest sites in the entire region.
exampleZh: 这座寺庙被认为是整个地区最神圣的场所之一。
